data.title: Michael Saylor: Strategy Bitcoin Accumulation Plan Has No Upper Limit, Purchase Efficiency Will Be Higher
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) Chairman Michael Saylor said in an interview at the Bitcoin 2025 Conference that his Bitcoin holding plan has no upper limit. As the price of Bitcoin continues to rise, the difficulty of buying Bitcoin will increase exponentially in the future, but Strategy will buy Bitcoin with higher efficiency.
However, Wall Street does not "buy" this Bitcoin strategy. The market has not seen any company become the "next Strategy". For example, Trump Media Technology Group announced that it would raise $2.5 billion to buy BTC, and its stock price has fallen by more than 20%, while GameStop's stock price fell by nearly 17% after buying Bitcoin. Michael Saylor believes that this situation is only a short-term dynamic, and Bitcoin on the balance sheet has proven to be very popular in the long run. (CNBC)

data.title: TON Falls 7% as Sell-Off Tied to Musk's Dispute of Telegram, xAI Partnership Continues
data.description:
Toncoin TON took a sharp dive in the last 24-hours, falling more than 7% from $3.319 to a low just under the $3 mark after as excitement around a rumored Telegram partnership with Elon Musk’s xAI reversed course.The plunge is the continuation of one that started shortly after Telegram CEO Pavel Durov hinted at a collaboration with xAI, Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence company.The speculation pushed TON’s price up to a $3
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/05/31/ton-falls-7-as-sell-off-tied-to-musks-dispute-of-telegram-xai-partnership-continues

data.title: EU slams US steel tariff hike, promises that countermeasures are coming
data.description:
The EU is calling out the White House after President Donald Trump said on Friday that he’s hiking steel and aluminum tariffs to 50%, up from the current 25%. According to Reuters, the European Commission responded just a day later, calling the decision reckless and warning that countermeasures are already in the works. Officials in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/eu-slams-us-steel-tariff-hike/

data.title: SEC outlines strategy to freeze budget and trim workforce
data.description:
The SEC is cutting back on staff and locking in its budget for next year. On Friday night, the agency said it’s asking Congress to keep its 2026 funding flat at $2. 15 billion, the same amount it received for 2025. Along with the frozen budget, the regulator wants to slash its full-time headcount by nearly […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sec-to-freeze-budget-and-trim-workforce/
